name: beatm-roast-mode
tagline: Your lineup. Their lineup. One AI roast. Maximum chaos.
pitch: ROAST MODE is a 1-vs-1 trash-talk battle. Two friends each pick a Daily Fantasy lineup. Claude — playing the role of a hyped-up sports commentator — reads both lineups and writes a personalized roast card with two takedowns, a verdict tag (FIRE / ICE / CHAOS / CLASSIC), a crowd-pulse score, and a winner pick. The card has its own shareable URL. Drop it in a group chat — friends pile on with emojis. Tomorrow, the loser builds a revenge lineup. It turns DFS — usually a solo statistical exercise — into a social spectacle.

event.name: Cursor Boston x Hult Sports Hack
event.prizePool: $1,200 cash + $50 Cursor Credits + Red Bull merch
